original_image_tags: dark gray document page with "CONFIDENTIAL" stamps at top and bottom, punch holes on left margin, and handwritten initials "Cl" in top left margin.

elements.description: The word 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamped at the top and bottom of the page, with punch holes near the top stamp.

A typed form titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' with numbered fields (1-26) and corresponding typed responses, including incident details, observer information, and object characteristics.
The number '3' typed in the bottom right corner of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps at the top and bottom and punch holes, but Description B adds details about a typed form and other text not mentioned in A.
